items.markdown:
Using **Himalayan salt bricks** in a sauna transforms a standard session into **halotherapy** , which combines heat with the therapeutic benefits of salt-infused air . When heated, these bricks release **negative ions** that help purify the air, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health.[[1]](https://www.salussaunas.com/blogs/blog/himalayan-salt-bricks-for-sauna#:~:text=Adding%20Himalayan%20salt%20bricks%20to,They%20can%20help:)[[2]](https://www.salussaunas.com/blogs/blog/himalayan-salt-bricks-for-sauna#:~:text=The%20microscopic%20salt%20particles%20in,reduce%20itching%2C%20and%20calm%20redness.)[[3]](https://mysaunaworld.com/blogs/sauna-tips/how-to-use-himalayan-salt-in-sauna#:~:text=Healthline%20explains%20that%20Himalayan%20salt,them%20reported%20an%20improved%20mood.)[[4]](https://www.pinksaltwall.com/blogs/salt-therapy/purify-air-boost-immunity-with-salt-bricks-for-sauna#:~:text=Conclusion:,method%20of%20improving%20your%20health.)

**Key Benefits** 

- **Respiratory Support** : Inhaled salt particles act as a natural expectorant, helping to clear mucus and soothe conditions like asthma or bronchitis.
- **Skin Rejuvenation** : The mineral-rich air creates a protective barrier on the skin, helping with conditions like eczema, psoriasis, and acne while providing a natural glow.
- **Stress Relief** : The warm amber glow of backlit bricks induces a state of calm (chromotherapy) and helps balance serotonin levels.
- **Air Purification** : The hygroscopic nature of salt attracts moisture and pollutants, effectively scrubbing the air in the sauna.[[1]](https://www.salussaunas.com/blogs/blog/himalayan-salt-bricks-for-sauna#:~:text=Adding%20Himalayan%20salt%20bricks%20to,They%20can%20help:)[[2]](https://buildsaltwall.com/blogs/salt-wall/himalayan-salt-walls-importance-in-your-sauna-for-relaxation#:~:text=A%20Himalayan%20salt%20bricks%20wall,respiratory%20health%2C%20and%20mental%20relaxation.)[[3]](https://qimassageandnaturalhealingspa.com/5-benefits-of-himalayan-salt-wall-therapy-for-wellness/#:~:text=The%20soft%2C%20warm%20glow%20of,good%E2%80%9D%20chemical%20in%20your%20brain.)[[4]](https://mysaunaworld.com/blogs/sauna-tips/how-to-use-himalayan-salt-in-sauna#:~:text=Healthline%20explains%20that%20Himalayan%20salt,them%20reported%20an%20improved%20mood.)[[5]](https://www.pinksaltwall.com/blogs/salt-therapy/purify-air-boost-immunity-with-salt-bricks-for-sauna#:~:text=Conclusion:,method%20of%20improving%20your%20health.)

**Top Product Recommendations** 

When choosing salt bricks, ensure they are 100% natural Himalayan salt sourced from reputable vendors like [Black Tai Salt Co.](https://www.blacktaisaltco.com/products/482sauna?variant=2064510386205&country=US&currency=USD&utm_medium=product_sync&utm_source=google&utm_content=sag_organic&utm_campaign=sag_organic) or [Pink Salt Wall](https://www.pinksaltwall.com/collections/salt-blocks).[[1]](https://www.amazon.com/Himalayan-Bricks-Tiles-Crystal-Improvement/dp/B0BPRXG5M4)[[2]](https://vocal.media/motivation/pink-salt-bricks-wholesale-value-and-benefits#:~:text=Sourcing%20high-quality%20Himalayan%20Salt%20Tiles%20for%20Walls,their%20extractive%20practices%20and%20solid%20quality%20prerequisites.)[[3]](https://www.blacktaisaltco.com/products/himalayan-salt-sauna-8-x-4-surface-area-32-sq-feet#:~:text=Shop%20now%20and%20enjoy%20fast%2C%20free%20shipping,for%20100%25%20natural%2C%20authentic%20pink%20Himalayan%20salt.)[[4]](https://www.ubuy.com.zm/product/1PJY7SNLY-himalayan-salt-brick-set-of-10-salt-bricks-8-quot-x4-quot-x2-quot-pink-salt-tiles-crystal-salt-slab-foot-detox-rock-salt-fingo#:~:text=Pink%20Salt%20wall%20Rock%20Salt%20Editorial%20Review,air%20quality%2C%20reducing%20stress%2C%20and%20enhancing%20relaxation.)

- **[Himalayan Pink Salt Bricks (8"x4"x2")](https://www.walmart.com/ip/4-x-8-x-2-Himalayan-Salt-Sauna-Brick/182602791?wmlspartner=wlpa&selectedSellerId=9016&selectedOfferId=931F374E1D3F415E8CAF9A8330717742&conditionGroupCode=1)** : Ideal for structural use. These thicker bricks (2 1 each at [Walmart](https://www.walmart.com/ip/4-x-8-x-2-Himalayan-Salt-Sauna-Brick/182602791?wmlspartner=wlpa&selectedSellerId=9016&selectedOfferId=931F374E1D3F415E8CAF9A8330717742&conditionGroupCode=1) ) are durable enough to handle high heat and humidity.
- **[Himalayan Salt Tiles (8"x4"x1")](https://www.ebay.com/itm/205320572361?chn=ps&mkevt=1&mkcid=28&google_free_listing_action=view_item)** : Best for decorative wall cladding or backlit panels. Thinner tiles (2 6 for a 2-pack on [eBay](https://www.ebay.com/itm/205320572361?chn=ps&mkevt=1&mkcid=28&google_free_listing_action=view_item) ) are easier to cut and install in higher wall areas.
- **Bulk Packs (100+ pieces)** : For full-wall installations, bulk packs ($~650–715 715 7 1 5 at Pink Salt Wall ) often include specialized **Saltite adhesive** to ensure a secure bond.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:14174910350653945314,catalogid:10994714541540528119,gpcid:6549375298000216802,mid:576462304690905009&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://buildsaltwall.com/blogs/salt-wall/guidelines-to-pick-the-best-pink-salt-bricks-for-the-project#:~:text=Another%20factor%20that%20is%20crucial,are%20solid%20and%20without%20defects.)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:10718329638722808258&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://vocal.media/humans/himalayan-salt-for-sauna-transform-your-space-into-relaxation#:~:text=Installing%20Himalayan%20salt%20for%20sauna,of%20any%20installed%20lighting%20setup.)[[5]](https://www.pinksaltwall.com/collections/salt-blocks#:~:text=Wholesale%20Salt%20Blocks%20and%20Bricks,exclusive%20product%20range%20fits%20perfectly.)

**Installation & Maintenance** 

1. **Placement** : Install bricks on a side or back wall away from direct water contact. **Avoid steam saunas** , as high moisture will cause the salt to dissolve.
2. **Mounting** : While heat-resistant adhesives are common, **metal profile systems** are often preferred as they allow for natural heat expansion without cracking the wall.
3. **Lighting** : Use IP67-rated, high-temperature **LED strips** behind the bricks to create the signature therapeutic glow.
4. **Cleaning** : Use only a **soft, dry cloth** to remove dust. Never use water or chemicals, as they will erode the salt.[[1]](https://www.salussaunas.com/blogs/blog/himalayan-salt-bricks-for-sauna#:~:text=Adding%20Himalayan%20salt%20bricks%20to,They%20can%20help:)[[2]](https://www.salussaunas.com/blogs/blog/himalayan-salt-bricks-for-sauna#:~:text=The%20Infrared%20Advantage,rather%20than%20a%20wellness%20wall.)[[3]](https://vocal.media/humans/himalayan-salt-for-sauna-transform-your-space-into-relaxation#:~:text=Installing%20Himalayan%20salt%20for%20sauna,of%20any%20installed%20lighting%20setup.)[[4]](https://vocal.media/humans/himalayan-salt-for-sauna-transform-your-space-into-relaxation#:~:text=Apply%20Adhesive:,1-2%20mm%20between%20them.)
